metadata.description: Singapore Computing curriculum covering O-Level (7155) and JC H2 (9569), with prerequisite ordering

nodes.label: Number Systems
nodes.description: Binary, denary and hexadecimal number systems; conversions between bases

nodes.label: Binary Arithmetic
nodes.description: Binary addition, subtraction; overflow; two's complement for signed integers

nodes.label: Text Representation
nodes.description: ASCII and Unicode character encoding; text storage in binary

nodes.label: Image Representation
nodes.description: Bitmap images; pixels, colour depth, resolution; image file size calculation

nodes.label: Sound Representation
nodes.description: Sampling; sample rate, bit depth, channels; sound file size calculation

nodes.label: Data Compression
nodes.description: Lossy vs lossless compression; run-length encoding; need for compression

nodes.label: Logic Gates
nodes.description: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR gates; truth tables; logic circuits

nodes.label: Boolean Expressions
nodes.description: Writing and simplifying Boolean expressions from truth tables and logic circuits

nodes.label: CPU Architecture
nodes.description: ALU, control unit, registers; fetch-decode-execute cycle; clock speed

nodes.label: Memory
nodes.description: RAM and ROM; cache memory; virtual memory; memory hierarchy

nodes.label: Secondary Storage
nodes.description: Magnetic, optical and solid-state storage; capacity; speed; cost comparisons

nodes.label: Input & Output Devices
nodes.description: Input devices (keyboard, mouse, scanner, microphone); output devices (monitor, printer, speaker)

nodes.label: Operating Systems
nodes.description: Functions of OS; memory management; process scheduling; file management; user interface

nodes.label: System & Application Software
nodes.description: Types of software; compilers, interpreters, assemblers; utility software; application software

nodes.label: Embedded Systems
nodes.description: Microcontrollers; sensors and actuators; real-world applications of embedded computing

nodes.label: Network Types & Topologies
nodes.description: LAN, WAN, MAN; star, bus, ring topologies; peer-to-peer vs client-server

nodes.label: Network Hardware
nodes.description: Routers, switches, hubs, access points, NICs; wired and wireless media

nodes.label: Network Protocols
nodes.description: TCP/IP; HTTP/HTTPS; FTP; email protocols (SMTP, POP3, IMAP); DNS

nodes.label: The Internet & WWW
nodes.description: How the internet works; IP addressing; URLs; web browsers; ISPs; packet switching

nodes.label: Cyber Threats
nodes.description: Malware (virus, worm, trojan, ransomware); phishing; social engineering; denial-of-service

nodes.label: Security Measures
nodes.description: Firewalls; anti-virus; encryption basics; authentication; access control; backups

nodes.label: Ethical & Social Issues
nodes.description: Data privacy; intellectual property; software licensing; digital divide; responsible use

nodes.label: Algorithm Design
nodes.description: Problem decomposition; structured approach; identifying inputs, outputs, processes

nodes.label: Flowcharts
nodes.description: Standard flowchart symbols; drawing and interpreting flowcharts for algorithms

nodes.label: Pseudocode
nodes.description: Writing pseudocode; standard pseudocode conventions; translating between pseudocode and code

nodes.label: Linear Search
nodes.description: Sequential search through a list; implementation; efficiency considerations

nodes.label: Binary Search
nodes.description: Searching sorted lists by halving; implementation; comparison with linear search

nodes.label: Bubble Sort
nodes.description: Bubble sort algorithm; step-by-step tracing; optimisation with flag

nodes.label: Insertion Sort
nodes.description: Insertion sort algorithm; tracing; comparison with bubble sort

nodes.label: Trace Tables
nodes.description: Dry-running algorithms using trace tables; tracking variable values step by step

nodes.label: Validation & Verification
nodes.description: Validation checks (range, length, type, format, presence); verification methods

nodes.label: Testing & Debugging
nodes.description: Test data (normal, boundary, erroneous); debugging techniques; error types (syntax, logic, runtime)

nodes.label: Variables & Constants
nodes.description: Declaring variables; naming conventions; constants; assignment

nodes.label: Data Types
nodes.description: Integer, float/real, string, char, Boolean; type casting and conversion

nodes.label: Operators & Expressions
nodes.description: Arithmetic (+, -, *, /, //, %); comparison; logical (AND, OR, NOT); operator precedence

nodes.label: Input & Output
nodes.description: Reading user input; displaying output; formatting output in Python

nodes.label: Selection (if/elif/else)
nodes.description: if, elif, else statements; nested selection; multi-way branching

nodes.label: Iteration (Loops)
nodes.description: for loops; while loops; nested loops; loop control (break, continue)

nodes.label: String Manipulation
nodes.description: String indexing and slicing; concatenation; string methods (len, upper, lower, find, split)

nodes.label: Arrays / Lists
nodes.description: 1D and 2D arrays (Python lists); indexing; traversal; insertion; deletion; list methods

nodes.label: Functions & Procedures
nodes.description: Defining and calling functions; parameters and arguments; return values; scope of variables

nodes.label: File Handling
nodes.description: Reading from and writing to text files; CSV file processing in Python

nodes.label: Databases
nodes.description: Flat-file vs relational databases; tables, records, fields; primary keys; foreign keys

nodes.label: SQL Basics
nodes.description: SELECT, FROM, WHERE; INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE; ORDER BY; simple queries on single tables

nodes.label: Number Representation (H2)
nodes.description: Two's complement; fixed and floating point representation; precision and range trade-offs

nodes.label: Floating-Point Representation
nodes.description: Mantissa and exponent; normalisation; floating-point arithmetic; rounding errors

nodes.label: Data Formats & Encoding (H2)
nodes.description: Advanced text encoding (UTF-8/16); vector vs bitmap graphics; video representation; data formats

nodes.label: Boolean Algebra (H2)
nodes.description: Boolean identities; De Morgan's laws; simplification using Karnaugh maps; XOR, XNOR gates

nodes.label: Processor Architecture (H2)
nodes.description: Von Neumann architecture; buses; instruction set; registers; pipelining; RISC vs CISC

nodes.label: Memory Management (H2)
nodes.description: Paging; segmentation; virtual memory; memory allocation; garbage collection

nodes.label: OS Concepts (H2)
nodes.description: Process management; scheduling algorithms; concurrency; deadlock; interrupts

nodes.label: Assembly Language
nodes.description: Machine code; assembly mnemonics; addressing modes; instruction execution

nodes.label: Network Architecture (H2)
nodes.description: OSI model layers; TCP/IP model; comparison; encapsulation and decapsulation

nodes.label: IP Addressing & Subnetting
nodes.description: IPv4 and IPv6; subnet masks; CIDR notation; subnetting; NAT

nodes.label: Routing
nodes.description: Routing tables; static and dynamic routing; routing protocols; traceroute

nodes.label: Application Protocols (H2)
nodes.description: HTTP/HTTPS; FTP; SMTP/POP3/IMAP; DNS resolution; DHCP; socket programming basics

nodes.label: Encryption & Cryptography
nodes.description: Symmetric vs asymmetric encryption; public/private keys; digital signatures; SSL/TLS; hashing

nodes.label: Network Security (H2)
nodes.description: Firewalls; intrusion detection; VPN; security policies; penetration testing; defence in depth

nodes.label: Social & Ethical Issues (H2)
nodes.description: Intellectual property; data protection legislation; AI ethics; digital divide; responsible computing

nodes.label: Algorithm Complexity
nodes.description: Big-O notation; time and space complexity; best, worst, average case analysis

nodes.label: Merge Sort
nodes.description: Divide-and-conquer merge sort; tracing; O(n log n) time complexity; space usage

nodes.label: Quicksort
nodes.description: Quicksort algorithm; pivot selection; partitioning; average vs worst-case complexity

nodes.label: Recursion
nodes.description: Recursive functions; base case and recursive case; call stack; tail recursion; recursion vs iteration

nodes.label: Graph Algorithms
nodes.description: Breadth-first search (BFS); depth-first search (DFS); shortest path (Dijkstra's); applications

nodes.label: Hashing Algorithms
nodes.description: Hash functions; collision resolution (chaining, open addressing); hash table operations

nodes.label: Arrays (H2)
nodes.description: Static vs dynamic arrays; 2D arrays; array-based implementations; advantages and limitations

nodes.label: Linked Lists
nodes.description: Singly and doubly linked lists; insertion, deletion, traversal; comparison with arrays

nodes.label: Stacks
nodes.description: Stack ADT; LIFO principle; push, pop, peek; array and linked-list implementations; applications

nodes.label: Queues
nodes.description: Queue ADT; FIFO principle; enqueue, dequeue; circular queue; priority queue; implementations

nodes.label: Binary Trees
nodes.description: Binary tree structure; traversals (in-order, pre-order, post-order); binary search trees; insert, delete, search

nodes.label: Graphs
nodes.description: Graph terminology (vertex, edge, directed, undirected, weighted); adjacency matrix; adjacency list

nodes.label: Hash Tables
nodes.description: Hash table data structure; hash functions; collision handling; load factor; O(1) average access

nodes.label: Classes & Objects
nodes.description: Defining classes; creating objects; attributes and methods; constructors; this/self reference

nodes.label: Encapsulation
nodes.description: Access modifiers (public, private, protected); getters and setters; data hiding; information hiding

nodes.label: Inheritance
nodes.description: Superclass and subclass; extending classes; method overriding; super keyword; inheritance hierarchies

nodes.label: Polymorphism
nodes.description: Method overloading; method overriding; dynamic binding; polymorphic references

nodes.label: Abstract Classes & Interfaces
nodes.description: Abstract classes; abstract methods; interfaces; implementing interfaces; design contracts

nodes.label: Exception Handling
nodes.description: Try-catch blocks; throwing exceptions; checked vs unchecked exceptions; custom exceptions

nodes.label: File I/O (H2)
nodes.description: Reading and writing files in Java; buffered I/O; serialisation; working with different file formats

nodes.label: Relational Data Model
nodes.description: Relations, tuples, attributes; primary key, foreign key, candidate key; referential integrity

nodes.label: Entity-Relationship Diagrams
nodes.description: Entities, attributes, relationships; cardinality (1:1, 1:M, M:M); ER to relational mapping

nodes.label: Normalisation
nodes.description: 1NF, 2NF, 3NF; functional dependencies; removing redundancy; denormalisation trade-offs

nodes.label: Advanced SQL
nodes.description: JOINs (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT); GROUP BY; HAVING; aggregate functions; subqueries; CREATE, ALTER, DROP

nodes.label: Database Integrity & Security
nodes.description: Data integrity constraints; transactions; ACID properties; access control; SQL injection prevention

nodes.label: Software Development Life Cycle
nodes.description: Waterfall, iterative, agile methodologies; requirements analysis; design; implementation; testing; maintenance

nodes.label: Testing Strategies (H2)
nodes.description: Unit testing; integration testing; system testing; acceptance testing; black-box vs white-box testing

nodes.label: Program Design
nodes.description: Top-down and bottom-up design; modular design; UML class diagrams; design patterns basics

nodes.label: Web Technologies
nodes.description: HTML, CSS, JavaScript; client-server model; web applications; APIs; dynamic web pages

nodes.label: Data Analytics
nodes.description: Data collection and cleaning; data visualisation; basic statistical analysis; spreadsheet and database tools
